name: Mashed Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the beans.
2. Add the remaining ingredients except the bacon drippings and mix well.
3. Season with salt and garlic to taste.
4. Heat the bacon drippings in a chafing dish.
5. Add the mixture to the heated drippings and stir until the cheese is melted and the dip is bubbling.
6. Serve warm with freshly made tortillas.
